nng_ctx

Group
Vendor bindings
struct nng_ctx {
    mut id : U32
namespace:
    func clone(shallow self: nng_ctx) returns shallow nng_ctx
    func delete(own self: nng_ctx, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func hash(shallow self: nng_ctx, hasher: HashFn) returns shallow U64
    func eq(shallow self: nng_ctx, shallow other: nng_ctx) returns shallow Bool
    func to_str(shallow self: nng_ctx) returns Str
    func size() returns shallow U32
}

nng_udp

Group
Vendor bindings
struct nng_udp {
namespace:
    func clone(_self: nng_udp) returns nng_udp
    func delete(own self: nng_udp, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func hash(self: nng_udp, hasher: HashFn) returns shallow U64
    func eq(_self: nng_udp, _other: nng_udp) returns shallow Bool
    func to_str(_self: nng_udp) returns Str
    func size() returns shallow U32
}

nng_thread

Group
Vendor bindings
struct nng_thread {
namespace:
    func clone(_self: nng_thread) returns nng_thread
    func delete(own self: nng_thread, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func hash(self: nng_thread, hasher: HashFn) returns shallow U64
    func eq(_self: nng_thread, _other: nng_thread) returns shallow Bool
    func to_str(_self: nng_thread) returns Str
    func size() returns shallow U32
}
